intro: Lovingly designed Easter animals coloring book full of child-friendly illustrations
description:
Easter Coloring Book for Kids & Toddlers is the perfect coloring book full of kid-friendly Easter vacation animal illustrations. All graphics and drawings were created for creative kids who love Easter and funny animals.

The game can be played directly on the Nintendo Switch™ touchscreen using a finger and without using Joy-Con™. Children simply tap, paint, and get creative!

Kids start the educational learning game by choosing an Easter animal line-art image and then enter the canvas area, where they can color the picture and freely paint in the background. The line-art can also be disabled, allowing children to draw on a blank canvas.

A wide selection of colors, brushes, and fill tool is available. The size of each drawing tool can be adjusted, and all buttons and tools can be hidden so only the drawing area remains visible.

It’s the perfect early-learning creative experience for young children to improve hand-eye coordination, explore colors, and enjoy a fun artistic journey with friendly animals and Easter decorations.
